model_phrasing: Model phrasing: GPT-5.x detected from the system harness; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4.

No real external adapter, product source, frame, threshold, or v1 artifact changed.

Real adapter integration remains forbidden and human-gated.

checkpoint_rejection_policy: Superficial, tautological, false-positive, fabricated, unsupported, stale, widened, or single-LLM-truth checkpoints are rejected. Missing, wrong-source, non-replayable, or contradicted evidence fails closed.
role_grammar: CKRs are measurable contribution context, not worker work.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
